liveClassification.value: Store-side failure: FIXED AND PROVEN (simulation layer, deterministic — before/after journeys 0/4 → 4/4 PASS). External visibility: no observed change, as structurally expected for a password-protected store; external verification requires an indexed store, which requires a design partner or a public store — a business step beyond this experiment.
